text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (Sigh... I can't stop replaying Tachyon's "Happy birthday" in my head! ♪)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(No way she wished me a happy birthday at
midnight! Just thinking about it is enough to keep
me smiling for a week!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...What's the matter, still worked up? All I did was
wish my dear roommate a happy birthday.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If that is all it took to get you into this state, what
would happen if I gave you a present, I wonder?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Fgweh! Y-you wouldn't! Would you?! You've
already slain me with your words alone!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! The way you get stimulated over such
trivial matters shows incredible energy
efficiency... How fascinating.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, dear Digital! Let us conduct an experiment
to measure how your psychosomatic functions
change in response to your excitement!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! A-an experiment?! You want me to be your
guinea pig for your experiment?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Wait here with bated breath, dear Digital. I will
return every thirty minutes to collect data from
your body.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I get to see you every thirty minutes?! Omigosh!
Somebody pinch meeeee!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Aaaaa! Is it really okay for my birthday to be this
blessed?!
